title: verbascum × erraticum
intro: Verbascum × erraticum, also known as the erratic mullein, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus, characterized by its unique and variable flower colors. Traditionally, Verbascum × erraticum has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of this plant include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe skin irritations. Verbascum × erraticum can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it.
